subject: protocol regarding data and document migration - final

emails.subject: RE: Protocol Regarding Data and Document Migration - Final
emails.subject_base: Protocol Regarding Data and Document Migration - Final
emails.body: RE: Protocol Regarding Data and Document Migration Final I am not comfortable being assigned as a contact person or anything else in connection with this since I don't understand what I am supposed to be doing and nobody has bothered to explain it to me. Before you circulate this, would someone please let me know exactly what this is so we can determine if I am the appropriate person to be involved? Thanks. To: Leite, Francisco Pinto; McAuliffe, Bob; Rub, Jenny; Hillier, Bob; Bucknell, Martin; Perlman, Beth; Daniels, Eddy; Sanders, Richard B.; Haedicke, Mark E.; Davis, Angela; Crady, Ned E.; 'louis.eber@ubsw.com'; 'brian.rosen@weil.com'; Kitchen, Louise; Keohane, Peter; Brownfeld, Gail; Murphy, Harlan; Guinn, Linda R.; Cox, Paige

emails.subject: RE: Protocol Regarding Data and Document Migration - Final
emails.subject_base: Protocol Regarding Data and Document Migration - Final
emails.body: No worries. Richard Sanders will handle it instead of you. Twanda is sending new protocol out.
